# #9967 wifi — real device Wi-Fi state (Pixel 6a, Android 16), captured alongside the on-device test
wifi_on(global): 1
dumpsys: Wi-Fi is enabled

# WifiStateInstrumentedTest.read_returnsStateWithRequiredKeysFromRealWifiManager cross-checks
# WifiState.read(ctx).enabled against Settings.Global.WIFI_ON (the value above).
